title: 10 best herbal creams for swollen feet
description: Aloe vera, also known as aloe, creams helps with swollen feet because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The cooling gel in aloe vera creams reduces swelling and eases pain by improving blood circulation. The moisture-rich properties of aloe vera also soothe and soften the skin, making it more pliable and reducing the discomfort associated with swollen feet.
